info.name: Corpers Connect API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Corpers Connect — a social platform for Nigerian NYSC corps members.

## Setup
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. Create an environment with the variable `baseUrl` set to your server URL (e.g., `http://localhost:3000` or your Railway URL).
3. Run **Auth > Login** first — tokens are auto-saved to collection variables.
4. For admin endpoints, run **Admin > Admin Login** first.

## Environments
- **Local:** `http://localhost:3000`
- **Production:** Your Railway deployment URL

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a Bearer token. The collection auto-manages tokens via test scripts.

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — registration, login, 2FA, sessions, and password management.

request.description: Lookup a corps member's NYSC data using their state code. Returns read-only NYSC profile for confirmation before registration.
Step 1 of registration. Validates state code against NYSC DB and sends a 6-digit OTP to the registered email.
Step 2 of registration. Verifies the OTP and creates the account. Returns access token and refresh token on success.
Login with state code or email + password. Returns JWT tokens. If 2FA is enabled, returns a challengeToken instead — use the 2FA Challenge endpoint.
Complete 2FA login. Submit TOTP code and challenge token received from login. Returns JWT tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token + refresh token pair (single-use rotation).

item.name: 👤 Users
item.description: User profiles, follow/unfollow, block/unblock, avatar upload, bookmarks, and FCM tokens.

request.description: Upload a profile picture. Send as multipart/form-data with field name `avatar`. Max 5MB.

item.name: 🔍 Discover
item.description: Discover other corps members — corpers in your state, follow suggestions, and search.

item.name: 📝 Posts
item.description: Create, read, update, and delete posts. Reactions, comments, and bookmarks.

request.description: Create a post. `content` or at least one `mediaUrl` is required. `visibility` is PUBLIC | FOLLOWERS | PRIVATE.
Edit a post. Only the author can edit, and only within 15 minutes of creation.
Add or update reaction. Reactions: LIKE | LOVE | FIRE | CLAP
Paginated home feed. Returns own posts + followed users' posts + public posts from same serving state. Ordered by most recent.
Upload a story. Expires after 24 hours automatically.
Only approved sellers can create listings.
Initiate a call. Returns callLog, Agora tokens, and channel info. type: AUDIO | VIDEO

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Frontend Developer Intern",
  "description": "3-month internship for corps members with React skills",
  "type": "INTERNSHIP",
  "location": "Lagos",
  "isRemote": false,
  "deadline": "2025-12-31T00:00:00Z"
}

request.description: status: PENDING | ACCEPTED | REJECTED | WITHDRAWN

Get available subscription plans. Public endpoint.

**Plans:**
- MONTHLY: ₦1,500 / 30 days
- ANNUAL: ₦14,000 / 365 days
Initialize a Paystack payment for a subscription plan. Returns a checkout URL to redirect the user. plan: MONTHLY | ANNUAL

header.description: HMAC-SHA512 of request body signed with Paystack secret

request.description: Paystack webhook endpoint. HMAC-SHA512 signature required in x-paystack-signature header.

item.name: ⚙️ Admin
item.description: Admin panel endpoints. Requires admin authentication via /admin/auth/login.

request.description: Admin login. Default superadmin credentials are set via SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL and SUPER_ADMIN_PASSWORD env vars.
Server health check. Returns 200 OK if the server is running.
